intended_use: VersaViewer is a medical diagnosis software designed to process 2D, 3D and 4D medical images series, providing radiologists and clinicians with a display framework and tools to ease multimodality imag
intended_use_full: VersaViewer is a medical diagnosis software designed to process 2D, 3D and 4D medical images series, providing radiologists and clinicians with a display framework and tools to ease multimodality imaging review and analysis.
other_metrics: The deep learning segmentation algorithm for six body parts (lung, liver, bone, aorta, heart, entire body) successfully passed defined acceptance criteria during bench testing validation.
